operator_report.title: Cultivation Data Upload Report
operator_report.summary: The uploaded cultivation sensor export can be reviewed, but one or more data quality or baseline comparison items need operator review.
key_observations: File contains 1 data rows, 3 columns, and 2 numeric columns.
Baseline comparison was limited because not enough usable rows were available.
Cultivation mapping identified columns for: temperature, humidity.
recommended_operator_checks: Review timestamp formatting and sampling consistency in the source export.
Compare the baseline and recent windows against facility logs for the same period.
Review unmapped CSV columns and rename source exports when labels are unclear.
limitations: This report uses only the uploaded CSV profile and simple baseline comparison.
No data is stored permanently and the Neraium engine has not been run.
This report does not identify root cause or predict crop stress, equipment failure, or yield impact.
Evidence is limited because the upload has data quality items requiring review.
Baseline comparison is limited because no numeric columns were analyzed.
